description: An attorney needs to request a 14-day extension from opposing counsel to respond to a set of discovery requests.

nodes.task_description: Draft a professional email to the opposing counsel.
In the email, clearly state the deadline you need extended and the proposed new deadline.

expected_outcome.value: The request is specific and unambiguous.

nodes.task_description: Briefly state the reason for the request (e.g., 'to allow for adequate time to gather the requested information from our client').
After receiving agreement, file a formal stipulation with the court if required by local rules.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows up to formalize the agreement.
